_description: CS-NGINXProxy stack — the UPSTREAM base image consumed via src/nginx-proxy-manager/Dockerfile. The monitor tracks its digest and triggers a release when it moves. It MUST NOT track this repo's own published image (ghcr.io/bauer-group/cs-nginxproxy/nginx-proxy-manager): doing so would loop — a release republishes it, its digest moves, the monitor fires again, forever.

images.name: nginx-proxy-manager
images.description: Nginx Proxy Manager base image, floating 2.x (src/nginx-proxy-manager/Dockerfile)
